# terrible_set_stats (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data` (String) A dictionary of which each key represents a stat (or variable) you want to keep track of.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `aggregate` (Boolean) Whether the provided value is aggregated to the existing stat `true` or will replace it `false`.
- `per_host` (Boolean) Whether the stats are per host or for all hosts in the run.
